privileged_info_summary: The task requires merging two calendar events in an Odoo scheduling environment. The two source events are: (1) 'Product Strategy Review' with attendees Alice Johnson, Emma Thompson, and David Chen, located at 'Product Lab'; (2) 'Engineering Architecture Discussion' with attendees David Chen, Emma Thompson, and Luis Fernandez, located at 'Engineering Lab'. The agent must create a new event called 'Product & Engineering Joint Review' scheduled for the same date as the first event from 10:00-12:00 (2 hours), set location to 'Product Lab', include all four unique attendees (Alice Johnson, David Chen, Emma Thompson, Luis Fernandez), and include a description containing 'Combined session covering product strategy and engineering architecture alignment.' The original two events must then be deleted. All metadata claims about event names, attendees, location, duration, and description requirements are verified against task.json, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
